assumptions: The adapter faithfully exposes the named Realization.
Reported events are complete for the adapter-observed boundary.

implementation.buildInstructions: Run the offline Deno check documented in implementations/ordered-map/typescript/README.md.
implementation.executionInstructions: Run adapter.ts with Deno's no-config, no-lock, no-npm, no-remote, and no-prompt flags.
implementation.interfaceMechanism: NDJSON messages over stdin and stdout

limitations: Evidence is bounded to ordered-map-ascii-fold/0.1.0 and its exact campaign.
Reported events cover only the adapter-observed invocation boundary.
No performance, concurrency, remote transport, registry discovery, or interoperation claim.
